description.ko: 날카로운 기하학적 구조와 디지털 글리치 아티팩트가 결합되어 KURO-X 인터페이스의 강력한 힘과 정밀함을 시각화한 첨단 테마입니다.
description.en: A high-tech visual experience blending sharp geometric structures with digital glitch artifacts, embodying the raw power and precision of the KURO-X interface.

prompt: KURO-X futuristic branding, geometric glitch art style, shattered polygons, digital distortion, neon cyan and deep black color palette, chromatic aberration, sharp vector lines, high-tech interface aesthetic, 8k resolution, minimalist but complex fragmentation, data corruption visuals.
